QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_60

question.text: What is the equity allocation range in NPS-TTS (Tier II Tax Saver)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS-TTS allows 10-25% equity allocation, up to 90% in debt instruments, and up to 10% in cash/money market instruments. **The Trap:** The equity range is 10-25%, much lower than regular NPS Active Choice (up to 75%). NPS-TTS is designed to be conservative. **Cross-Exam Context:** NPS-TTS: 10-25% equity, up to 90% debt, up to 10% cash. This makes it a conservative tax-saving instrument. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For risk-averse Central Govt employees, NPS-TTS offers 80C benefits with minimal equity risk compared to ELSS.
